name: comote
description: Comote local remote companion for Codex Desktop.

scripts.desktop:dev: npm run desktop:icons && npm run sidecar:build && tauri dev
scripts.dist:mac: npm run desktop:icons && npm run sidecar:build:mac && node scripts/install-prod-deps.mjs && tauri build --bundles app --target aarch64-apple-darwin && node scripts/create-mac-dmg.mjs
scripts.dist:win: npm run desktop:icons && npm run sidecar:build:win && node scripts/install-prod-deps.mjs && tauri build --bundles nsis --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc && node scripts/collect-tauri-artifacts.mjs win
